title: Module 1 Project: Inventory Correction and Cleanup
summary: Correct audited inventory values and remove only two approved test records through six cumulative steps.

sketchBlocks.title: Inventory Correction and Cleanup Project
sketchBlocks.bodyMarkdown: In this project, you will take on the role of an Inventory Data Steward tasked with cleaning up an inventory database. An audit has identified incorrect prices, unfinished statuses, and internal test rows that need to be corrected or removed. Your goal is to create a SQL script that precisely targets these issues without affecting legitimate records. This project will guide you through a series of steps to preview, update, and verify changes to ensure the integrity of the inventory data.

quizDraft.title: Preview the Audit Targets
quizDraft.prompt: Write a SELECT statement to preview the inventory items with ids 2, 4, and 6, showing their price, status, test flag, and notes.
quizDraft.starterCode: -- Write a query that satisfies the exercise prompt.

starterFiles.content: -- Write a query that satisfies the exercise prompt.

solutionFiles.content: SELECT id, price, status, is_test, notes FROM inventory_items WHERE id IN (2, 4, 6);

quizDraft.solutionCode: SELECT id, price, status, is_test, notes FROM inventory_items WHERE id IN (2, 4, 6);
quizDraft.hint: Use the lesson explanation and the wording of this question to narrow the answer.

help.concept: This support text was repaired because the original wording revealed the answer too directly.
help.hint_1: Compare the question to the lesson example and remove details that do not match the requested concept.
help.hint_2: Use the role or evidence named in the prompt instead of relying on answer wording.

quizDraft.title: Correct One Item Precisely
quizDraft.prompt: Update the inventory item with id 2 to set the price to 8.25 and status to 'active'.
quizDraft.starterCode: -- Write a query that satisfies the exercise prompt.

starterFiles.content: -- Write a query that satisfies the exercise prompt.

solutionFiles.content:
SELECT id, price, status, is_test, notes FROM inventory_items WHERE id IN (2, 4, 6);

UPDATE inventory_items SET price = 8.25, status = 'active' WHERE id = 2;

quizDraft.solutionCode:
SELECT id, price, status, is_test, notes FROM inventory_items WHERE id IN (2, 4, 6);

UPDATE inventory_items SET price = 8.25, status = 'active' WHERE id = 2;

quizDraft.prompt: Update all non-test Decor items to set last_updated to '2026-02-10'.
